texto: The main reason for the failure of the modern medical science is that it is dealing with results and not causes. Nothing more than the patching up of those attacked and the burying of those who are slain, without a thought being given to the real strong hold.
explicacao: Citação de Edward Bach sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The main reason for the failure of the modern medical science is that it is dealing with results …” articula reflexao, science, strong em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como strong e medical.
